target_rules: Preserve the source object name exactly unless the source SQL explicitly renames it.
Do not emit SQL Server-only brackets, GO batches, or session settings.

unsupported_object_types.table: SQL Server table extraction is not implemented in this tool yet. Skip table migration from SQL Server or add deterministic extraction support first.
unsupported_object_types.synonym: PostgreSQL synonym migration is not supported by this tool for SQL Server sources.
unsupported_object_types.cursor: Standalone cursor objects are not supported as migratable objects for PostgreSQL in this tool.

view: Convert SQL Server view syntax to valid PostgreSQL view syntax.
storedprocedure: Convert SQL Server procedure syntax to valid PostgreSQL CREATE PROCEDURE syntax.
function: Convert SQL Server function syntax to valid PostgreSQL CREATE FUNCTION syntax.
trigger: Convert SQL Server trigger syntax to valid PostgreSQL trigger plus function semantics where PostgreSQL requires them.
sequence: Convert SQL Server sequences to valid PostgreSQL CREATE SEQUENCE syntax when present.
